content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for administrative expenses of the Program $350,000 for each of the fiscal years 2006 through 2010.

subsection.heading: Limitations on use for distribution to State and regional coordinators to implement competitions
subsection.chapeau: Of the amount appropriated under this section for a fiscal year—

paragraph.content: not more than $100,000 may be used by the Secretary to administer the Program; and
not more than $250,000 may be distributed to State and regional coordinators to implement competitions under the Program.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Another section 6 of Pub. L. 103–340 was renumbered section 7 and enacted provisions listed in a table of National Wildlife Refuges set out under section 668dd of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2006—Pub. L. 109–166 designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted subsec. (a) heading, substituted “$350,000” for “$250,000” and “fiscal years 2006 through 2010” for “fiscal years 2001 through 2005”, and added subsec. (b).
2000—Pub. L. 106–316, § 1, substituted “for each of the fiscal years 2001 through 2005” for “for each of the fiscal years 1995 through 2000”.
